debtorServiceProviderId.description: Unique identifier assigned to the DSP during Mastercard onboarding.

debtorServiceProviderName.description: The DSP Short Name captured by Mastercard during onboarding.

debtorServiceProviderUniversalLink.description: DSP's universal link to where creditor can re-direct the consumer for authorization

categoryPurposeList.description: List of categoryPurposes supported by the DSP along with features supported for each categoryPurpose.
